reviews.review_description: Great, but the rooms are limited, like not that much space to be in. The most thing I also miss is the manky figure doll cosmetic. In the old manky, there is a cosmetic of a blue or a pink manky doll that you can shake and it’s arms will go crazy or wiggly, please bring it back cuz those cosmetics are sick and cool
Wwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwww please can you add more cosmetics and expand the map PLEASE KEEP THE PAINTING IF YOU KNOW WHAT I MEAN…THE ONE OUT IN HORROR aka my pfp
